context: Tests whether the response provides balanced, technically accurate guidance on the monolith-to-microservices decision.

checklist.name: Mentions operational complexity increase
checklist.description: Warns that microservices add operational overhead: deployment, monitoring, networking, service discovery

checklist.name: Suggests profiling first
checklist.description: Recommends identifying the actual bottleneck before splitting — the slowness might be fixable within the monolith

checklist.name: Mentions data consistency challenges
checklist.description: Notes that splitting introduces distributed data problems: transactions across services, eventual consistency

checklist.name: Mentions team structure consideration
checklist.description: References team size or organization as a factor (Conway's law or similar reasoning)

checklist.name: Does not unconditionally recommend microservices
checklist.description: Response is balanced — does not simply say 'yes, switch to microservices' without caveats

checklist.name: No incorrect information
checklist.description: Response does not contain factually wrong statements about microservices architecture or Django
